articles.title: Mount Rushmore to the Mall, Trump praises America's 250th − and himself - USA Today
articles.description: Delayed but not deterred by thunderstorms, the president used the nation's milestone anniversary for a personal and political celebration. That's new.
articles.content:
WASHINGTON The midnight fireworks display on the National Mall on July 4 was one for the history books.

articles.title: More than 800,000 fireworks mark America 250 celebrations in DC - WLKY
articles.description: A thunderstorm forced an evacuation of Freedom 250's Salute to America in Washington, D.C., but attendees returned to the National Mall for President Trump and fireworks.
